We need to produce exactly 2 sentences summarizing email, capturing main point and any action items. The email: Completed OSS dependency audit. Results: 234 packages scanned, 2 issues found. (1) charting library uses AGPL (viral license, incompatible with our SaaS model). Alternative: switch to Apache-licensed Chart.js. (2) One package has no license. Recommend removing both before next release. - Legal/Engineering

So main point: audit completed, found two licensing issues. Action items: replace AGPL charting library with Apache-licensed Chart.js, and remove the unlicensed package before next release.
